title: centaurea cassia
intro: Centaurea cassia, also known as Knapweed or Starthistle, is a perennial flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and ease respiratory problems. The health benefits of Centaurea cassia include its ability to support digestive health, reduce anxiety and stress, and boost the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Centaurea cassia is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications such as creams and ointments.
